title: VelocityPersistent
description:
Connect the players to the server they logged off from! 
Does not rely on disconnect events and handles server crashes/restarts. Optionally disallows player connection if the last server is offline
body:
# Velocity plugin that keeps the server player joins on persistent! 
## Made for a seamless multi-server SMP.
### Kinda-supports fallback
- If velocity.toml "try" is empty - will handle the server selection and won't let players fall on other servers if target is offline/crashed/stopped
## Requires DEFAULT_SERVER in config to determine what server put new players on
## Editable kick message on server offline join attempt - in config



**True FALLBACK is still WIP. Dont try to change config for last 2 variables, it will change nothing**
